basics.name: Ashley Chen
basics.label: Senior Product Manager
basics.summary: Senior product manager with 8 years of experience shipping consumer fintech products. Currently leading the savings team at Stripe. Previously at Plaid, Robinhood, and a YC-backed startup. MBA from Stanford GSB.

work.summary: Lead product for the consumer savings line.
highlights: Launched the high-yield savings account that grew to 2M users and $4B in deposits in 14 months.
Cut new-user onboarding from 7 minutes to 90 seconds by rebuilding the KYC flow.
Drove the cross-functional partnership with the risk and compliance teams on the multi-state deposit-broker model.
Owned the developer-facing API for income verification, used by 800+ fintech apps.
Shipped the Brazilian Pix integration generating $12M ARR in its first year.
Rotational APM program: shipped on the equities, options, and crypto teams.
Led the redesign of the order entry screen that improved order completion rate by 23%.

projects.name: Stripe Savings
projects.description: Consumer high-yield savings account integrated with Stripe Issuing and Stripe Treasury.
highlights: Launched in 8 US states at GA, expanded to 47 within 9 months.
$4B in deposits, 2M users, 4.6 star rating in the app store.

projects.name: Plaid Income (Brazil)
projects.description: Income verification using Pix instant-payment data, the first non-US Plaid product.

publications.name: What we learned building the savings-as-a-product team at Stripe
publications.summary: Reflections on building a regulated consumer fintech product inside an infrastructure company.

awards.title: Top 50 PMs to Watch — Lenny's Newsletter
awards.summary: Industry-recognition list of high-impact product managers.

volunteer.summary: Mentor early-career engineers from underrepresented backgrounds in tech.
